title: schc: document compression design decisions inline
description: User-requested documentation/code-clarity task. Add inline comments or compile-time constants near the SCHC implementation that fully detail the compression decisions made for LICHEN: rule scope, fallback behavior, packet-header accessor policy, vector compatibility, and the boundary between generic RFC 8724 SCHC and LICHEN-specific profiles. Acceptance: comments live in the SCHC source/header where maintainers see them while editing; any constants introduced are compile-time constants; no behavioral change unless required for clarity; existing SCHC tests still pass or are explicitly not run.
close_reason: Added inline SCHC design-decision documentation and compile-time packet-layout constants; standalone SCHC C tests pass.
